channel.title: Azure App Configuration on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure App Configuration on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Evaluate feature rollouts with Azure App Configuration Scorecards
item.description:
Azure App Configuration has added scorecards in public preview. The feature uses telemetry to show how feature flag variants are performing in production so teams can assess rollout impact.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Unlock Client-Side Configuration at Scale with Azure App Configuration and Azure Front Door
item.description:
Azure App Configuration now integrates with Azure Front Door in public preview, allowing dynamic configuration to be delivered directly to client-side applications at CDN scale. The update focuses on secure distribution and new flexibility for modern app configurations.

  • Source: Azure Updates
